items.label: 亮屏解锁
items.title: 适合无密码或测试机
items.text:
adb shell input keyevent WAKEUP
adb shell wm dismiss-keyguard
adb shell input keyevent HOME

items.label: 跳过开机向导
items.title: 不同 ROM 支持程度不同，失败行默认继续
items.text:
# 跳过开机向导：不同 ROM 支持程度不同
adb shell settings put global device_provisioned 1
adb shell settings put secure user_setup_complete 1
adb shell settings put secure tv_user_setup_complete 1
adb shell pm disable-user --user 0 com.google.android.setupwizard || true
adb shell pm disable-user --user 0 com.google.android.partnersetup || true
adb shell pm disable-user --user 0 com.android.provision || true
adb shell input keyevent HOME

items.label: 开发者选项

items.label: Wi-Fi 设置
items.title: 打开 Wi-Fi 设置页面

items.label: 设备信息
items.title: 查看型号、系统、分辨率、电池
items.text:
adb shell getprop ro.product.model
adb shell getprop ro.build.version.release
adb shell wm size
adb shell wm density
adb shell dumpsys battery
